tasks.label: Bước 1: Cài đặt Dependencies
tasks.command: if [ "$TERM_PROGRAM" = "vscode" ]; then npm install; else exit 0; fi

tasks.label: Bước 2: Cấu hình Doppler
tasks.command: if [ "$TERM_PROGRAM" = "vscode" ]; then doppler setup --project 20206205tech --config dev; else exit 0; fi

tasks.label: Bước 3: Chạy NestJS Dev
tasks.command: if [ "$TERM_PROGRAM" = "vscode" ]; then doppler run -- npm run start:dev; else exit 0; fi
